zh.Eardisley, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利
zh.Stretton Sugwas, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾斯特頓 素瓦斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Sybil Milbourne於1471年出生在英國賀福爾波吉爾時，她的父親Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire36歲，母親Jane Baskerville32歲。她於1510年2月與Sir John Breynton在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年11月26日在奧地利享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Eardisley, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利
zh-hans.Stretton Sugwas, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾斯特頓 素瓦斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Sybil Milbourne于1471年出生在英国賀福爾波吉爾时，她的父亲Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire36岁，母亲Jane Baskerville32岁。她于1510年2月与Sir John Breynton在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年11月26日在奥地利享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Sybil Milbourne was born in 1471, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, was 36 and her mother, Jane Baskerville, was 32. She married Sir John Breynton in February 1510, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 26 November 1537, in Austria, at the age of 66, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Sybil Milbourne est née en 1471, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Jane Baskerville, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Breynton en février 1510, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 novembre 1537, à Autriche, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Sybil Milbourne 1471 in Burghill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire 36 und ihre Mutter Jane Baskerville 32. Sie hat im Februar 1510 in Staffordshire, England Sir John Breynton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. November 1537 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Österreich und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sybil Milbourne è nata il nel 1471 nel Burghill, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Jane Baskerville, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Breynton nel febbraio 1510, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 26 novembre 1537, nel Austria, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sybil Milbourneが1471年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshireは36歳，母Jane Baskervilleは32歳であった。1510年2月にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir John Breyntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1537年11月26日にオーストリアで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sybil Milbourne(이)가 1471년 영국 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Baskerville(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1510년 2월 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir John Breynton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 11월 26일 오스트리아에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Sybil Milbourne nasceu em 1471, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Jane Baskerville, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Breynton em fevereiro de 1510, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de novembro de 1537, em Áustria, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Sybil Milbourne родилась в 1471 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Baskerville, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Breynton февраль 1510 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 ноября 1537 г. в местности Австрия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Sybil Milbourne nació en 1471, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Jane Baskerville, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir John Breynton en febrero de 1510, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de noviembre de 1537, en Austria, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
